## Summary

- Describe the main change.
- Mention the user-facing impact.

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m black --check .`
- [ ] `python -m build`

## Documentation

- [ ] README update not needed
- [ ] Spec update not needed
- [ ] Changelog note included in the PR description when relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Public API changes called out clearly
